name: Aperture AC
business: A blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target. It intends to focus on identifying a business combination target in the digital assets industry and targets lower middle market companies building essential digital asset infrastructure.

exposures.sentence: Although we may pursue an initial business combination in any industry or geographic location, we intend to focus on identifying a business combination target in digital assets industry.
Potential areas of focus include infrastructure in tokenized assets, decentralized finance, data security, payments, and mining or data center operations.
Potential areas of focus include infrastructure in tokenized assets, decentralized finance, data security, payments, and mining or data center operations.
These companies are innovating across finance, gaming, computing, digital identity and cross-border payments.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have 12 months from the closing of this offering to consummate an initial business combination or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve.

tamClaims.claim: Over $18 billion worth of tokenized real-world assets are live on public blockchains
tamClaims.sentence: Recent data shows that over $18 billion worth of tokenized real-world assets (excluding stablecoins) are already live on public blockchains, with the majority of this value represented by U.S. Treasuries.
